query: ALTER TABLE transcriptions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processingStep VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE transcriptions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS processingProgress INT DEFAULT 0; ALTER TABLE transcriptions MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'error', 'cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
